assertion_results.text: Task count is between 3 and 10 inclusive
assertion_results.evidence: There are exactly 6 task files in the outputs directory: task-1-advisory-severity-summary-model.md, task-2-advisory-severity-aggregation-service.md, task-3-advisory-summary-endpoint.md, task-4-cache-invalidation.md, task-5-integration-tests.md, task-6-api-documentation.md. 6 is within the range [3, 10].

Every task file has '## Repository' followed by 'trustify-backend' on the next line: Task 1 (line 4), Task 2 (line 4), Task 3 (line 4), Task 4 (line 4), Task 5 (line 4), Task 6 (line 4). No task references any other repository.

assertion_results.text: Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1: no Dependencies section. Task 2: 'Depends on: Task 1' (line 52). Task 3: 'Depends on: Task 2' (line 52). Task 4: 'Depends on: Task 3' (line 39). Task 5: 'Depends on: Task 3' (line 54). Task 6: 'Depends on: Task 3' (line 36). Dependency graph: 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> {4, 5, 6}. This is a tree (and therefore a DAG) with no circular dependencies.

assertion_results.text: Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the repo-backend.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: All Files to Modify paths exist in repo-backend.md manifest: Task 1 modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (manifest line 41), Task 2 modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (manifest line 46), Task 3 modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (manifest line 48), Task 4 modifies modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (manifest line 83), Task 5 modifies tests/api/sbom.rs (manifest line 111), Task 6 modifies README.md (manifest line 14). All Files to Create are new files in existing directories: Task 1 creates advisory_summary.rs in modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/ (parent exists at manifest lines 40-43), Task 3 creates advisory_summary.rs in modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/ (parent exists at manifest lines 47-50), Task 5 creates advisory_summary.rs in tests/api/ (parent exists at manifest lines 110-113).

assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: All 7 impact map bullet points name specific artifacts: (1) 'Add AdvisorySeveritySummary response model struct with fields critical, high, medium, low, total in the SBOM model module'; (2) 'Add service method on SbomService to query and aggregate advisory severity counts...using the existing sbom_advisory join table and advisory entity'; (3) 'Add GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary endpoint handler...supports an optional ?threshold query parameter'; (4) 'Register the new endpoint route in the SBOM endpoints module with 5-minute tower-http cache configuration'; (5) 'Add cache invalidation logic in the advisory ingestion pipeline to invalidate cached advisory summaries when new advisories are linked to an SBOM'; (6) 'Add integration tests...covering: successful aggregation, 404 for non-existent SBOM, deduplication, threshold filtering, and cache behavior'; (7) 'Update API documentation to include the new endpoint path, parameters, and response shape'. Each bullet references concrete struct names, service names, endpoint paths, table names, or test scenarios.

assertion_results.evidence: All 6 tasks have '## Repository' containing only 'trustify-backend' as a single repository name with no additional repositories: Task 1 line 4, Task 2 line 4, Task 3 line 4, Task 4 line 4, Task 5 line 4, Task 6 line 4.
